title: Update Dyes
description: Updates old dye textures from version 1.21.9
body:
**Update Dyes** — updates old dye textures from version 1.14 to the latest. The textures of the dyes were changed in Minecraft Bedrock Preview 1.21.110.20, now the dyes are supposedly in a saucer or on a cardboard.

A convenient resource pack, now the dyes will become more pleasing to the eyes.

![Update Dyes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40ad6b6f6a37cb5bb0b7c3cc3c293dfbd21a7314.png)
